title: NDA socio-economic report 2024 to 2025
body: "Over the last five years, we have invested over £60 million of direct socio-economic funding across the UK, leveraging millions of pounds of further investment from partners, to support significant projects that enable permanent and sustainable change in our site communities.  In 2024/25, the NDA group invested £14.13 million of direct socio-economic funding. This report details how and where this money has been invested, including links to case studies of some of the larger projects we are now progressing with local partners across our site communities. "
